title: Botany Pots:GrowableOres Compat
description: Use recipe make growable ores compatible with BotanyPots.
body:
![ 2025-08-24 175712.jpg](https://s2.loli.net/2025/08/24/kBYsDUzpN6agZtc.jpg)
A simple compatibility mod add recipe to make **Growable Ores** work properly with **Botany Pots**.

This allows ores from Growable Ores to be planted, grown, and harvested inside Botany Pots just like other compatible crops.

![ 2025-08-24 175739.jpg](https://s2.loli.net/2025/08/24/GCRSgkXK79iVIYO.jpg)


**For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!**
